purpose: Freeze and summarize the D01-D09 knowledge governance stack before any live runtime or activation work.
covered_stages: D01 Daily Guidance & Panchang engine governance
D02 Word of the Day curated rotation bank
D04 Daily Guidance rule validation and selection preview
D05 Panchang/Festival source registry and validation preview
D06 Mantra source registry and review preview
D08 Subscriber entitlement and privacy gate preview
guardrails: Do not enable live public dynamic output.
Do not enable subscriber or premium guidance.
Do not enable Auth or session detection.
Do not enable payment or entitlement checks.
Do not expose birth/profile/premium guidance data.

next_stage_gate.reason: D10 is a consolidation/reporting stage only. Runtime activation requires a separate explicit activation stage.
